description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant with long, lance-shaped green leaves that radiate outward from several central stems. The leaves are a deep, glossy green with some subtle variation in shading, giving the plant a lush and healthy appearance. The plant is housed in a simple, modern, square-shaped pot that appears to be made of a smooth, light gray material. The pot is filled with dark soil, visible at the base of the plant, and the overall design is minimalist with no visible decorative elements. The plant's foliage is dense and slightly asymmetrical, with some leaves arching outward more than others, creating a natural, organic silhouette. This type of potted plant is commonly used as a decorative accent in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential interiors.
description: A lush, green potted plant with long, pointed leaves in a plain, square, light gray pot. The plant has a dense, natural arrangement and a modern, minimalist appearance.
description_view_0: The plant is seen at a slight angle, showing the full spread of its leaves and the square pot with a prominent front leaf drooping downward.
description_view_1: This view is more head-on, highlighting the central cluster of leaves and the symmetrical shape of the pot, with leaves fanning out evenly.
description_view_2: The plant is viewed from another side, showing a slightly different arrangement of leaves and the pot's clean, straight edges.
description_view_3: This angle reveals the plant's asymmetry, with some leaves extending further to the right, and the pot's side is more visible.
